message:
feat(ifc): enforce fail-closed authorization for Secret/TopSecret flows to SealedSink

Harden the IFC (Information Flow Control) layer so that Secret and
TopSecret flows to SealedSink are no longer immediately authorized
by clearance predicate alone:

- New FlowAuthorizationAdvisory and FlowAuthorizationAssessment types
- New assess_flow_authorization() method returns structured assessment
  with advisories and concrete declassification obligations
- materialize_declassification_obligation() generates concrete
  obligations from authorization references
- is_flow_authorized() now delegates to assessment (fail-closed)
- Edge case test: sealed_sink_ignores_blank_authorization_refs
- Integration test updates: Secret->SealedSink now returns false
- New tests for obligation materialization and blocked-without-auth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
